SectionDescription: Explore videos, organizations, talks, and practices that support mindfulness, compassion, nervous-system regulation, movement, and nature-based wellbeing.

Resources.Title: Stanford CCARE Videos
Resources.Description: Video resources from Stanford's Center for Compassion and Altruism Research and Education, including talks and conversations about compassion, altruism, and applied practice.

Resources.Title: Why Breathwork Matters | Andrew Weil, M.D.
Resources.Description: A short video introducing the value of breathwork and breathing practices as part of wellbeing.

Resources.Title: Brainwave Entrainment Benefits Chart
Resources.Description: A visual resource from EOC Institute that introduces alpha, theta, and delta brainwave patterns in relation to meditation and relaxation.

Resources.Title: Insight Meditation Center
Resources.Description: A meditation center and resource hub for insight meditation teachings, talks, and practice support.

Resources.Title: Spirit Rock Meditation Center
Resources.Description: A meditation center offering teachings, retreats, and practice resources rooted in mindfulness and insight meditation.

Resources.Title: Wednesday Meditations with Dr. Rick Hanson
Resources.Description: Ongoing meditation resources from Rick Hanson, PhD, focused on practical reflection, resilience, and inner steadiness.

Resources.Title: How to Make Stress Your Friend
Resources.Description: Kelly McGonigal's TED Talk on rethinking stress and understanding the role of connection in stress response.

Resources.Title: Andrew Huberman on Sleep, Stress, Diet & Nutrition
Resources.Description: A Stanford Medicine Instagram Live recording with Andrew Huberman on sleep, stress, diet, and nutrition.

Resources.Title: Joyous Body Audiobook
Resources.Description: An audiobook resource connected to body awareness, movement, and embodied wellbeing.

Resources.Title: Hope Molecules with Kelly McGonigal
Resources.Description: A video clip about movement, hope, and the body-based benefits often discussed in Kelly McGonigal's work.

Resources.Title: Association of Nature and Forest Therapy
Resources.Description: The Association of Nature and Forest Therapy website, with resources about forest therapy, guide training, trail certification, and the global forest therapy community.

Resources.Title: Polar Bear Shaking Trauma
Resources.Description: A short video often shared in somatic education contexts to show how animals discharge stress through movement after threat.

Resources.Title: Nature Journaling Video
Resources.Description: A video resource with tools and tips for beginning a nature journaling practice.
